name: dev-lifecycle
description: Canonical marketplace-discoverable reference for the five-phase development lifecycle: task-driver(1) → worktree(2) → bots(3) → merge(4: GH-native gh pr merge --auto) → audit-review(5). Composes the already-language-agnostic task-driver, staged-review, and cloud-delegation plugins (plus the worktree-workflow include) into one named chain. Pre-merge (Phase 4) is GitHub-native auto-merge — see `plugins/staged-review/templates/auto-merge.md`. v1.1.0: commit-review skill deleted; chain collapses six-phase → five-phase. Pure documentation/orchestration — no new behavior, no Elixir coupling, standalone-extractable.
